query: 2026 gubernatorial debates scheduled summer 2026 Pennsylvania Shapiro Garrity, Oregon Kotek Drazan, Arizona Hobbs, Wisconsin - any debate before September 2026
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the bottom line:

**No confirmed head-to-head general-election gubernatorial debate is scheduled before September 2026 in any of the four states.**

- **Pennsylvania (Shapiro vs. Garrity):** No debate scheduled. Both are *willing* (first time both nominees open to it since 2018); Garrity called for 7 debates. Nothing confirmed.
- **Oregon (Kotek vs. Drazan):** The only summer general-election debate with a firm date — the ONPA debate on **July 24, 2026** — was **declined by Kotek**. She instead proposed three televised debates starting in **September**.
- **Arizona (Hobbs vs. TBD):** Primary is **July 21, 2026**, so no GOP nominee yet; general debates historically fall in October.
- **Wisconsin (open seat):** Primary is **Aug. 11, 2026**; confirmed general-election debates are **Oct. 8 and Oct. 9** — both after September.

Many *primary* (intra-party) debates occurred in spring/summer 2026, but those are not the general-election matchups. Full structured findings with sources and data points have been submitted.

sources.title: Shapiro and Garrity open to a 2026 PA governor debate
sources.snippet: Both candidates willing to participate in at least one debate; no debate actually scheduled; Shapiro won't negotiate terms through the press.

sources.title: Garrity Calls For Seven Debates vs. Shapiro
sources.snippet: Garrity wants seven gubernatorial debates, one per PA media market, ahead of Nov. 3 general election.

sources.title: Gov. Kotek won't debate Drazan with Oregon newspaper group
sources.snippet: Kotek declined the ONPA debate scheduled July 24, 2026 at Salem Convention Center, citing a busy summer calendar; she proposed three debates instead.

sources.title: RELEASE: Governor Tina Kotek Challenges Senator Christine Drazan to Three Debates
sources.snippet: Campaign challenged Drazan to three 60-minute televised debates in Portland, Eugene, and Medford starting in September.

sources.title: Decision 2026: Gov. Kotek challenges Christine Drazan to three televised debates
sources.snippet: Kotek proposes three televised debates, first proposed for September.
